registry_scope: Admissible-Existence subject repositories mirrored as formalism records.
authority_boundary: This registry mirrors and classifies formalism records from Admissible-Existence subject repositories. It does not create source authority, proof authority, execution authority, continuity standing, or admissibility standing.

records.name: State Transition Continuity Model
records.purpose: Mirror public-safe metadata for State Transition Continuity Model and connect continuity review to transition posture, runtime governance, boundary conditions, evidence, and receipts.
records.transition_relationship: state transition continuity canonical detail page installed; source-confirmed proof and validation extraction pending
non_claims: Wiki mirroring does not make STCM a StegVerse source authority.
Wiki mirroring does not define, prove, or validate STCM claims.
